intro: Ericoides confertum, also known as Confertum, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Ericoides confertum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. In traditional medicine, Confertum is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in the production of herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules.
